# Taskify — collaborative task board

**Status**: Accepted
**Author**: Barna

## What & why

Taskify lets a small team track work on a shared board with drag-and-drop
columns. It exists so a team can see status at a glance without a heavyweight
tool.

## User scenarios

- A member creates a card and assigns it to a column.
- A member drags a card across columns to change its status.

## Clarifications

- Q: How many columns? A: Four fixed columns (Todo, Doing, Review, Done).
